description: 500 hulls (200 sphere + 200 ico + 100 cylinder), Release build
pre-allocate arrays + reuse horizon buffer. Worse: over-alloc pollutes cache on small inputs.
cache farthest conflict vertex per face. Within noise, added complexity not worth marginal gain.
O(E) multi-adjacent fixup via generation stamps. Replaced O(E^2) shared-edge counting. 1.3x speedup.
cache face centroid from qh_recompute_face. Eliminates edge-loop walk in qh_opp_face_dist.
maxoutside upper-bound pruning in qh_next_conflict. Skip faces with low maxoutside.
fast triangle normal via cross product. Replaces Newell loop for triangles.
flip plane-widening loop order. Points outer, faces inner for cache locality.
inline edge lookup in qh_add_adjoining_face. No measurable improvement.
use cached num_verts in poly-fin check. Stale values produce incorrect merge decisions.
limit fixup scan to new faces only. Multi-adjacent pairs only involve new faces. 2.25x total.
two-pass qh_next_conflict (head-only face scan). Slightly worse due to suboptimal face selection.
cached centroid for normal-fix in build_output. Eliminates edge-loop centroid recomputation.
hoisted plane + inlined dist in qh_next_conflict. Better register reuse.
inlined opp_face_dist with lazy reverse distance. Avoids redundant dot products.
build_output face loop validation behind QH_DEBUG.
batch 3-edge alloc in create_triangle. No measurable improvement.
SoA normal layout for plane widening. Auto-vectorizable inner loop.
iterative horizon DFS with explicit stack. Correctness bugs causing infinite loops.
